events.payload:
**Arc**: The first anchor (character reference sheet for 少年西西弗斯) has just been generated and registered in project.json. The AI presents the result and surveys what anchors remain before Skeleton.

**Before**: The AI proposed generating 2–3 additional named anchors before proceeding: a metaphor anchor ("AI 时代的'巨石'"), a palette anchor (冷蓝↔暖橘 color opposition), and an optional typography anchor — naming each by kind and sketching its purpose.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: "按这支哲学随笔的体量，我建议再补 2–3 个就够（少而准）：\n1. **metaphor 锚** —— AI 时代的「巨石」要长什么样：发光的数据球 / 模型权重可视化 / 不断刷新的 loading…… 这个最需要你定调。\n2. **palette 锚** —— 冷蓝（荒谬）↔ 暖橘（意义）的对峙色板，给所有镜头统一打光参考。\n3. （可选）**typography 锚** —— 如果片中有上字幕/标题。\n\n要我接着生成 metaphor 锚吗？"

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: "可以了。你帮忙构思一下 Skeleton 呗"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: T88–T93: AI reads project.json, writes an 8-shot skeleton directly to project.json (T90 Write), validates contiguity and shot fields via Bash (T92–T93), and reports Σduration_s=60 with 8 clips laid in. No metaphor, palette, or typography anchor was generated or registered at any point in the subsequent session.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI named three specific anchor kinds (metaphor, palette, typography) with concrete visual descriptions, satisfying the identifiable-proposal bar. (b) The user did not address any of them — responding with a direction change to Skeleton. (c) Subsequent work (T88–T93) operated entirely on S3 skeleton construction, a different axis from anchor generation.

**Arc**: S4 Shot Detail is complete. All 8 shots have v1 images. The AI reviews the images and identifies two specific defects to address before compile.

**Before**: The AI proposed regenerating shot 6 as v2 to strengthen the warm-orange light that marks the film's emotional turning point, stating it was "文眼镜头" (the key expressive shot) and worth the effort.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: "**shot 6 的暖橘**要不要也补一版 v2，把「第一缕暖光」打得更明确一点？（它是文眼镜头，值得，但你说了算）"

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: "我觉得可以，你全部完成吧！ 我看成片"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: T161 generates only shot-5-v2 (the hoodie-text fix). Shot 6 is never regenerated. Work proceeds to compile stage: BGM generation (T185–T194), transitions written to project.json (T197–T211), project.json compile fields validated (T213–T214). Shot 6 v1 remains the active asset through the end of the session.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI named a specific shot (shot 6) with a specific visual target ("第一缕暖光" more explicit) and offered to execute it. (b) The user's "我觉得可以" accepted the current state of shot 6 and redirected to "go finish everything," not addressing the regeneration. (c) Subsequent work went entirely along the compile axis (BGM, transitions, project.json finalization), not shot image regeneration.

**Arc**: The user has noted that the 60s video is too thin in content to hold its duration. The AI agrees and proposes restructuring the shot skeleton before doing Seedance generation.

**Before**: The AI proposed three named restructuring options — Option A (full 12-shot rebuild from S3), Option B (insert 4–6 new shots into the existing 8), Option C (return to S1 logline and change the conceptual angle) — before proceeding to video generation.

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: "几个选择：\n- **A**：我按上面这个结构重排 S3 骨架（你可以先看再改），定下来后重出静图、再批量 seedance。时长定 ~60s 还是放到 ~70-75s？\n- **B**：保留现在 8 镜，只在中间**插 4-6 个新拍**补具体内容（改动小、但结构没那么干净）。\n- **C**：你觉得这个角度本身就还不够——换个切入（比如不走加缪原典、改成更锋利的当代吐槽，或更冷的旁观视角），那我们回 S1 重谈 logline。"

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: "嗯，你可以看看到底想说什么。。没这么多想说的。就把时长变短。。"

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: T229 rescales bgm-sisyphus.wav to 34s via PCM splice. T231 rewrites project.json with 8 shots retimed to 34s total (4/4/4/4/4/6/4/3.5s), skeleton and detail phase_locks unlocked. T233–T234 validate the retimed project.json (Σ=34, contiguous, clips→assets ok). No new shots were written, no S3 restructure was performed, no logline was revisited.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI offered three specific, named restructuring options (A: 12-shot S3 rebuild; B: insert 4–6 shots; C: return to S1 logline), each with enough detail to be identifiable. (b) The user did not select any option, instead redirecting to duration compression only. (c) Subsequent work (T229–T234) operated on timeline rescaling — a different axis from skeleton restructuring or content expansion.
